creator: minsoochoo0122@proton.me
text: Right now, FreeBSD uses jemalloc(http://jemalloc.net) for memory allocating. The latest release came out in 2019 and it was reflected to FreeBSD in 2020, but the development is still ongoing. This bug report should be closed, and if there is any problem regarding this, this should be reported to jemalloc repository(https://github.com/jemalloc/jemalloc)
